title: TitanPRO™ Fanback Plastic Folding Chair - Black
features: TitanPRO™ Fanback Plastic Folding Chairs add a little bit of character and extra durability to the traditional plastic folding chair.
Made to the same rugged specifications as our commercial-grade TitanPRO™ poly folding chairs, these are a popular and attactive alternative for graduation and wedding seating.
The chairs feature a strong 18 gauge steel frame and 1st grade polypropylene plastic combined for a commercial quality chair.
The paint finish is an extremely durable baked on powdercoat.
The chairs fold and stack to 50 chairs high for transport or up to 100 chairs high for warehouse storage.
Transport and setup is easy with the integrated carrying handle built into the chair back.
Non-marring feet caps ensure that the chairs can be used indoors or outdoors.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 50 or more

faq.question: How many chairs can I stack?
faq.answer: We recommend these chairs stack 50 high on a dolly or 100 chairs high on the floor.

faq.question: What is the best way to clean plastic folding chairs?
faq.answer: Wipe them down with a cloth or sponge soaked in warm, soapy water. For tougher stains, use a soft-bristle brush. Rinse with clean water and let them air dry. Avoid harsh chemicals like bleach to protect the plastic.

faq.question: How long will plastic folding chairs last with regular care?
faq.answer: Our commercial-grade plastic folding chairs are built to withstand heavy use in event and hospitality settings. With regular cleaning and proper storage, they can last well over a decade, making them a durable and reliable choice for your business.
